Mavericks Announce Cooper Flagg Upgraded to AVAILABLE for Sunday's Game vs. Raptors** | **YES** | **HIGH** confidence[1]

Dallas Mavericks rookie **Cooper Flagg**, the No. 1 pick and ROY frontrunner, was downgraded to questionable due to injury management on their midfoot sprain but has now been officially upgraded to available for the Sunday matchup in Toronto[1]. This follows his recent return f
